result.stdout:
OpenApiGen - Generate TypeScript clients from OpenAPI definitions

Usage: OpenApiGen <openapi-file> <output-dir>
       OpenApiGen --help

Arguments:
  <openapi-file>         Path to the OpenAPI definition JSON file
  <output-dir>           Output directory for the generated client (will be purged)
